paths.title: Govern a procurement agent before production
paths.business_question: Can this procurement agent compare PO, invoice, challan, and vendor evidence safely before production?

steps.title: Start with business intent
steps.why_it_matters: Prevents the project from being perceived as another chatbot demo.

steps.title: Run governance classification
steps.what_user_sees: Suitability, risk, data readiness, and production gates.
steps.why_it_matters: Shows that agent adoption is gated by risk and evidence.

steps.title: Check approval and evidence
steps.what_user_sees: Reviewer decision, required evidence, and approval state.

steps.title: Execute only in sandbox
steps.what_user_sees: Dry-run connector behavior and tool run ledger.
steps.why_it_matters: Shows safe enterprise-system interaction without side effects.

steps.title: Review trace and audit history
steps.what_user_sees: Who requested what, what policy decided, and what happened next.
steps.why_it_matters: Turns governance into inspectable operating evidence.

steps.title: Close with readiness report
steps.what_user_sees: Procurement control-plane case outcome and next actions.
steps.why_it_matters: Connects technical controls to business readiness.

paths.success_signal: A non-technical executive can explain the control-plane lifecycle after one walkthrough.

paths.title: Review the control-plane architecture
paths.business_question: Is this architecture bounded, auditable, provider-neutral, and ready for non-production evaluation?

steps.title: Inspect deployment profiles
steps.what_user_sees: Local, Docker, public demo, and enterprise reference profiles.

steps.title: Review safety boundaries
steps.what_user_sees: Model risk register and prompt/response safety review.

paths.success_signal: An architect can identify the safe next integration point without reading every doc.
